overall.description: A samurai character walks along a moonlit beach at night in a video game (Ghost of Tsushima), approaching and entering a beachside camp with bonfires and wooden structures. The footage features cinematic blue moonlight reflecting off wet sand and ocean waves, transitioning from open coastal wilderness to a populated campsite.

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily along the shoreline with sword on back, silhouetted against the moonlit sky

entered.detail: bright full moon dominating the night sky, casting blue light across the scene
gentle waves breaking on the shoreline with white foam visible
dark wet beach sand reflecting moonlight
clear night sky filled with visible stars
low fog or sea mist hovering over the distant water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, empty beach at night. The camera follows a samurai character from behind as he walks along the shoreline. The full moon hangs low in the sky, casting a cool blue light across the wet sand and gentle ocean waves to the left. The atmosphere is serene and isolated, with stars visible overhead and distant mist hovering over the water.

events.description: text 'BEACHSIDE CAMP' appears in lower right corner indicating entry to named location

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the beach toward the distant camp, passing rock formations on the right

entered.detail: tall dark rock outcropping marking the edge of the beach
warm orange light from fires visible in the distance indicating the camp
broken wooden boat hull partially buried in the sand

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the beach narrows, with large rock formations appearing on the right. The distant glow of campfires becomes visible ahead, and the wreckage of wooden boats litters the left side of the beach. The text 'BEACHSIDE CAMP' appears on screen, signaling the transition into a named game location.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachside camp with bonfires and wooden fortifications

events.description: passing first active bonfire with visible flames and embers, lighting changes from pure moonlight to mixed firelight

agents.ego_description: walking through the camp past bonfires and wooden barricades, approaching NPC figures near the fires

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figures standing near the bonfire in the camp

entered.detail: active campfire with bright flames and glowing embers providing warm orange light
rough wooden fence and defensive wall structures around the camp perimeter
canvas tents and temporary shelters in the background
wooden boxes and supplies stacked near the barricade

segments.scene_description: The character enters the beachside camp, where the environment becomes more enclosed with wooden barricades and large rocks. Active bonfires provide warm orange light that mixes with the blue moonlight. Silhouetted NPC figures stand near the fires, and the character walks past supply crates and defensive structures. The ocean is now visible only in the far distance to the left as the camp occupies the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene, isolated shoreline into the warm, cluttered environment of a fortified beachside camp. It begins by trailing a samurai from behind as he walks along a wide expanse of wet sand under a low full moon, with cool blue light reflecting off gentle ocean waves and distant mist. As the character continues forward, the beach narrows between large rock formations and wreckage from wooden boats, while the distant glow of campfires signals the approach of a named location. The scene then shifts into the camp itself, where the open coast gives way to wooden barricades and defensive structures. Finally, the lighting transforms as the blue moonlight mixes with the orange flicker of active bonfires, casting silhouettes of figures across supply crates as the ocean recedes into the far distance.
